methods.name: KillSplash
methods.signature: public static void KillSplash()
methods.summary: Destroy the splash screen if it is being displayed.

methods.name: SetCustomColorDialog
methods.signature: public static void SetCustomColorDialog(EventHandler<GetColorEventArgs> handler)

methods.name: ShowAboutDialog
methods.signature: public static void ShowAboutDialog(bool forceSimpleDialog)

methods.name: ShowCheckListBox
methods.signature: public static bool[] ShowCheckListBox(string title, string message, IList items, IList<bool> checkState)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's check list box.

params.name: items
params.doc: A list of items to show.

params.name: checkState
params.doc: A list of true/false boolean values.

returns.doc: An array or boolean values determining if the user checked the corresponding box. On error, null.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Color)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(ref Color color)
methods.summary: Display Rhino's color selection dialog.

params.name: color
params.doc: [in/out] Default color for dialog, and will receive new color if function returns true.

returns.doc: true if the color changed. false if the color has not changed or the user pressed cancel.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Color4f, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha)
methods.summary: Displays the standard modal color picker dialog for floating point colors.

params.name: color
params.doc: The initial color to set the picker to and also accepts the user's choice.

params.name: allowAlpha
params.doc: Specifies if the color picker should allow changes to the alpha channel or not.

returns.doc: true if a color was picked, false if the user canceled the picker dialog.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Color, Boolean, String)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(ref Color color, bool includeButtonColors, string dialogTitle)
methods.summary: Display Rhino's color selection dialog.

params.name: color
params.doc: [in/out] Default color for dialog, and will receive new color if function returns true.

params.name: includeButtonColors
params.doc: Display button face and text options at top of named color list.

returns.doc: true if the color changed. false if the color has not changed or the user pressed cancel.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Object, Color4f, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(Object parent, ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha)
methods.summary: Displays the standard modal color picker dialog for floating point colors.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent window for this dialog, should always pass this if calling from a form or user control.

params.name: color
params.doc: The initial color to set the picker to and also accepts the user's choice.

params.name: allowAlpha
params.doc: Specifies if the color picker should allow changes to the alpha channel or not.

returns.doc: true if a color was picked, false if the user canceled the picker dialog.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(IWin32Window, Color4f, Boolean)
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("Use ShowColorDialog(object parent, ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha)")] public static bool ShowColorDialog(IWin32Window parent, ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha)
methods.summary: Displays the standard modal color picker dialog for floating point colors.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent window for this dialog, should always pass this if calling from a form or user control.

params.name: color
params.doc: The initial color to set the picker to and also accepts the user's choice.

params.name: allowAlpha
params.doc: Specifies if the color picker should allow changes to the alpha channel or not.

returns.doc: true if a color was picked, false if the user canceled the picker dialog.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Color, Boolean, String, NamedColorList)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(ref Color color, bool includeButtonColors, string dialogTitle, NamedColorList namedColorList)
methods.summary: Display Rhino's color selection dialog.

params.name: color
params.doc: [in/out] Default color for dialog, and will receive new color if function returns true.

params.name: includeButtonColors
params.doc: Display button face and text options at top of named color list.

params.name: namedColorList
params.doc: If not null and contains one or more named colors the Rhino color dialog named color list will be replaces with this list.

returns.doc: true if the color changed. false if the color has not changed or the user pressed cancel.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Object, Color4f, Boolean, Dialogs.OnColorChangedEvent)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(Object parent, ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha, Dialogs.OnColorChangedEvent colorCallback)
methods.summary: Displays the standard modal color picker dialog for floating point colors.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent window for this dialog, should always pass this if calling from a form or user control.

params.name: color
params.doc: The initial color to set the picker to and also accepts the user's choice.

params.name: allowAlpha
params.doc: Specifies if the color picker should allow changes to the alpha channel or not.

params.name: colorCallback
params.doc: May be optionally passed to ShowColorDialog and will get called when the color value changes in the color dialog.

returns.doc: true if a color was picked, false if the user canceled the picker dialog.

methods.name: ShowColorDialog(Object, Color4f, Boolean, NamedColorList, Dialogs.OnColorChangedEvent)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowColorDialog(Object parent, ref Color4f color, bool allowAlpha, NamedColorList namedColorList, Dialogs.OnColorChangedEvent colorCallback)
methods.summary: Displays the standard modal color picker dialog for floating point colors.

params.name: parent
params.doc: Parent window for this dialog, should always pass this if calling from a form or user control.

params.name: color
params.doc: The initial color to set the picker to and also accepts the user's choice.

params.name: allowAlpha
params.doc: Specifies if the color picker should allow changes to the alpha channel or not.

params.name: namedColorList
params.doc: If not null and contains at least one named color this list will replace the standard Rhino Color list displayed by the rhino color dialog.

params.name: colorCallback
params.doc: May be optionally passed to ShowColorDialog and will get called when the color value changes in the color dialog.

returns.doc: true if a color was picked, false if the user canceled the picker dialog.

methods.name: ShowComboListBox
methods.signature: public static Object ShowComboListBox(string title, string message, IList items)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's combo list box.

params.name: items
params.doc: A list of items to show.

returns.doc: selected item.null if the user canceled.

methods.name: ShowContextMenu
methods.signature: public static int ShowContextMenu(IEnumerable<string> items, Point screenPoint, IEnumerable<int> modes)
methods.summary: Creates an ETO ContextMenu from an array of strings. Use the modes array to enable/disable menu items

methods.name: ShowEditBox
methods.signature: public static bool ShowEditBox(string title, string message, string defaultText, bool multiline, out string text)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's string edit box.

params.name: multiline
params.doc: Set true for multi line editing.

returns.doc: true of OK was clicked, false otherwise.

methods.name: ShowLineTypes
methods.signature: public static Object ShowLineTypes(string title, string message, RhinoDoc doc)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's LineType list box.

returns.doc: The id of the selected item if successful, null on cancel.

methods.name: ShowListBox(String, String, IList)
methods.signature: public static Object ShowListBox(string title, string message, IList items)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's list box.

params.name: items
params.doc: A list of items to show.

returns.doc: The selected item if successful, null on cancel.

methods.name: ShowListBox(String, String, IList, Object)
methods.signature: public static Object ShowListBox(string title, string message, IList items, Object selectedItem)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's list box.

params.name: items
params.doc: A list of items to show.

returns.doc: The selected item if successful, null on cancel.

methods.name: ShowMessage(String, String)
methods.signature: public static ShowMessageResult ShowMessage(string message, string title)
methods.summary: Same as System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show but using a message box tailored to Rhino.

returns.doc: One of the ShowMessageBoxResult values.

methods.name: ShowMessage(String, String, ShowMessageButton, ShowMessageIcon)
methods.signature: public static ShowMessageResult ShowMessage(string message, string title, ShowMessageButton buttons, ShowMessageIcon icon)
methods.summary: Same as System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show but using a message box tailored to Rhino.

params.name: buttons
params.doc: Which buttons to display in the message box.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Which icon to display in the message box.

returns.doc: One of the ShowMessageBoxResult values.

methods.name: ShowMessage(Object, String, String, ShowMessageButton, ShowMessageIcon, ShowMessageDefaultButton, ShowMessageOptions, ShowMessageMode)
methods.signature: public static ShowMessageResult ShowMessage(Object parent, string message, string title, ShowMessageButton buttons, ShowMessageIcon icon, ShowMessageDefaultButton defaultButton, ShowMessageOptions options, ShowMessageMode mode)
methods.summary: Same as System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show but using a message box tailored to Rhino.

params.name: buttons
params.doc: Which buttons to display in the message box.

params.name: icon
params.doc: Which icon to display in the message box.

params.name: defaultButton
params.doc: Which button is the default button.

params.name: mode
params.doc: The modality of the message box.

returns.doc: One of the ShowMessageBoxResult values.

methods.name: ShowMultiListBox
methods.signature: public static string[] ShowMultiListBox(string title, string message, IList<string> items, IList<string> defaults = null)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's multiple selection list box.

params.name: items
params.doc: A list of items to show.

returns.doc: The selected items if successful, null on cancel.

methods.name: ShowNumberBox(String, String, Double)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowNumberBox(string title, string message, ref double number)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's number edit box.

returns.doc: true of OK was clicked, false otherwise.

methods.name: ShowNumberBox(String, String, Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public static bool ShowNumberBox(string title, string message, ref double number, double minimum, double maximum)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's number edit box.

returns.doc: true of OK was clicked, false otherwise.

methods.name: ShowPropertyListBox
methods.signature: public static string[] ShowPropertyListBox(string title, string message, IList items, IList<string> values)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's property list box.

returns.doc: A list of property values if successful, null otherwise.

methods.name: ShowSelectLayerDialog
methods.signature: public static bool ShowSelectLayerDialog(ref int layerIndex, string dialogTitle, bool showNewLayerButton, bool showSetCurrentButton, ref bool initialSetCurrentState)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's single layer selection dialog.

params.name: layerIndex
params.doc: Initial layer for the dialog, and will receive selected layer if function returns DialogResult.OK.

params.name: showNewLayerButton
params.doc: true if the new layer button will be visible.

params.name: showSetCurrentButton
params.doc: true if the set current button will be visible.

params.name: initialSetCurrentState
params.doc: true if the current state will be initially set.

returns.doc: True if the dialog was closed with the OK button. False if the dialog was closed with escape.

methods.name: ShowSelectLinetypeDialog
methods.signature: public static bool ShowSelectLinetypeDialog(ref int linetypeIndex, bool displayByLayer)
methods.summary: Displays Rhino's single linetype selection dialog.

params.name: linetypeIndex
params.doc: Initial linetype for the dialog, and will receive selected linetype if function returns true.

params.name: displayByLayer
params.doc: Displays the "ByLayer" linetype in the list. Defaults to false.

returns.doc: True if the dialog was closed with the OK button. False if the dialog was closed with escape.

methods.name: ShowSelectMultipleLayersDialog
methods.signature: public static bool ShowSelectMultipleLayersDialog(IEnumerable<int> defaultLayerIndices, string dialogTitle, bool showNewLayerButton, out int[] layerIndices)

returns.doc: True if the dialog was closed with the OK button. False if the dialog was closed with escape.

methods.name: ShowSunDialog
methods.signature: public static bool ShowSunDialog(Sun sun)
methods.summary: Show the tabbed sun dialog.

returns.doc: Returns true if the user clicked OK, or false if the user canceled.

methods.name: ShowTextDialog
methods.signature: public static void ShowTextDialog(string message, string title)
methods.summary: Display a text dialog similar to the dialog used for the "What" command.

params.name: message
params.doc: Text to display as the message content.

params.name: title
params.doc: Test to display as the form title.
